name_cn:
CALYPSO_ Calfskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian calf leather, it feels soft and smooth. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic snap closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables; otherwise, it has a minimalist design for effortless use.
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153
